calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by For the Record (9:40am-9:57am) (505)

Daniel Ishu, Esq., appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff, Tenth and Market LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Food Genius Labs CA, Inc or Lanetta Denise Diaz.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witness Patti Quinsay, appearing via Zoom, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants Food Genius Labs Ca, Inc. and Lanetta Denise Diaz jointly and severally as follows:

Damages: $157,479.27
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,482.47
Attorney's Fees: $4460.00
Costs: $1069.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $174,491.59
Judgment signed in open court.
